description_long: This cabin features a modern, rectangular design with horizontal wooden siding and a prominent gable roof covered in gray shingles. The front facade is largely open, resembling a garage door or large entryway, with a triangular wooden gable above. The side walls display a mix of tall, narrow windows and a single vertical door, while one side includes a metal chimney pipe extending from the wall. The roof includes a skylight, adding to the contemporary feel and allowing natural light into the interior. The overall structure is compact and streamlined, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The materials and finishes suggest a blend of functionality and modern aesthetics, suitable for urban or suburban environments.
description: A modern, rectangular wooden cabin with a gable roof, large open front, tall windows, and a skylight, featuring clean lines and minimalistic design.
description_view_0: This view shows a long side of the cabin with horizontal wooden siding, a single tall vertical window, and part of the gray shingled roof with a skylight.
description_view_1: This end view highlights the narrow gable side, mostly solid black with visible roof lines and a protruding metal chimney pipe.
description_view_2: This side view displays two tall, narrow windows and a metal chimney pipe, with the wooden siding and shingled roof clearly visible.
description_view_3: The front view reveals a large open entryway beneath a triangular gable, with the interior partially visible and no visible door.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with gray asphalt shingles and a single skylight
attribute_window_arrangement: Asymmetrical arrangement with three tall, narrow rectangular windows distributed along the longer sides; two grouped together on one side and one isolated on the opposite side.
attribute_door_placement: One vertical exterior door located on the long side of the cabin, with a large open entryway (garage-style) on the gable end.
